records.question: Which countries have a capital with the exact value 3503.0 and a life expectancy that is exactly 63.7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.capital = 3503.0 AND country.lifeexpectancy = 63.7
records.pred_sql:
SELECT country.code 
FROM country 
WHERE country.Capital = 3503.0 AND country.LifeExpectancy = 63.7

records.question: Which country named Sudan in Africa has a government form exactly Islamic Republic, a region of Northern Africa, an independence year of 1956, a surface area at most 2505813.0, and a GNP exactly 10162.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.region = 'Northern Africa' AND country.indepyear = 1956.0 AND country.surfacearea <= 2505813.0 AND country.governmentform = 'Islamic Republic' AND country.continent = 'Africa' AND country.gnp = 10162.0 AND country.name = 'Sudan'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT country.code 
FROM country 
WHERE region = 'Northern Africa' 
  AND indepyear = 1956.0 
  AND surfacearea <= 2505813.0 
  AND governmentform = 'Islamic Republic' 
  AND continent = 'Africa' 
  AND gnp = 10162.0 
  AND name = 'Sudan'

records.question: Which countries named 'France' that have related city and countrylanguage records have an official language marked as false and a GNP of at least 1424285.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE countrylanguage.isofficial = 'F' AND country.gnp >= 1424285.0 AND country.name = 'France'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Code
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.Code = ci.CountryCode
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
WHERE c.GNP >= 1424285.0 AND c.Name = 'France' AND cl.IsOfficial = 'F'
GROUP BY c.Code
HAVING COUNT(ci.ID) > 0 AND COUNT(cl.ID) > 0

records.question: Where is the country whose head of state is France-Albert René and that has a city named Victoria in the Mahé district?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
WHERE country.headofstate = 'France-Albert René' AND city.name = 'Victoria' AND city.district = 'Mahé'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Code
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.Code = ci.CountryCode
WHERE c.HeadOfState = 'France-Albert René'
  AND ci.Name = 'Victoria'
  AND ci.District = 'Mahé'

records.question: Which country in Africa has the name Egypt, a head of state exactly Hosni Mubarak, a population of at least 68470000, a surface area of at least 1001449.0, independence year at least 1922, and includes the city Zagazig with a population of at least 267351?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
WHERE city.name = 'Zagazig' AND country.name = 'Egypt' AND city.population >= 267351 AND country.headofstate = 'Hosni Mubarak' AND country.population >= 68470000 AND country.surfacearea >= 1001449.0 AND country.indepyear >= 1922.0 AND country.continent = 'Africa'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Code
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.Code = ci.CountryCode
WHERE c.Name = 'Egypt'
  AND c.HeadOfState = 'Hosni Mubarak'
  AND c.Population >= 68470000
  AND c.SurfaceArea >= 1001449.0
  AND c.IndepYear >= 1922.0
  AND c.Continent = 'Africa'
  AND ci.Name = 'Zagazig'
  AND ci.Population >= 267351

records.question: What countries have a surface area of exactly 70273.0 and a population of at least 3775100?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.surfacearea = 70273.0 AND country.population >= 3775100
records.pred_sql: SELECT country.code FROM country WHERE country.surfacearea = 70273.0 AND country.population >= 3775100

records.question: Which African republics have a life expectancy of exactly 50.1, a GNP old value of at least 5279.0, and a GNP of at most 5493.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
WHERE country.gnpold >= 5279.0 AND country.continent = 'Africa' AND country.lifeexpectancy = 50.1 AND country.governmentform = 'Republic' AND country.gnp <= 5493.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT country.code
FROM country
WHERE gnpold >= 5279.0
  AND continent = 'Africa'
  AND lifeexpectancy = 50.1
  AND governmentform = 'Republic'
  AND gnp <= 5493.0

records.question: Which countries that have cities named 'Taizhou' with a population of at least 152442, and that have associated countrylanguage records, have a name exactly equal to 'China', a GNP old value at most 917719.0, a life expectancy at least 71.4, and an independence year at most -1523.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.gnpold <= 917719.0 AND country.name = 'China' AND country.lifeexpectancy >= 71.4 AND country.indepyear <= -1523.0 AND city.name = 'Taizhou' AND city.population >= 152442
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Code
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.Code = ci.CountryCode
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
WHERE c.GNPOLD <= 917719.0
  AND c.Name = 'China'
  AND c.LifeExpectancy >= 71.4
  AND c.IndepYear <= -1523.0
  AND ci.Name = 'Taizhou'
  AND ci.Population >= 152442
  AND cl.CountryCode IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which countries are located in the region 'Eastern Asia' and have at least one city as well as at least one countrylanguage associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.region = 'Eastern Asia'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT country.code
FROM country
JOIN city ON country.code = city.countrycode
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.region = 'Eastern Asia'
GROUP BY country.code
HAVING COUNT(city.id) > 0 AND COUNT(countrylanguage.language) > 0

records.question: Which countries named Iran have a government form that is exactly Islamic Republic?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT country.code FROM country
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.code = countrylanguage.countrycode
WHERE country.name = 'Iran' AND country.governmentform = 'Islamic Republic'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Code
FROM country c
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
WHERE c.Name = 'Iran' AND c.GovernmentForm = 'Islamic Republic'
